response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep systems thinking, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but his recent career gap and lack of explicit focus on distributed systems, Python mastery, or operational ownership in AI-native environments raise concerns about readiness for a Staff-level technical strategy role in an AI-driven engineering org.
strengths: Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Proven experience building high-throughput systems (e.g., DLang microservices handling millions of requests/sec)
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership through workshops and tools like GISCollective
concerns: Current career gap since October 2025 undermines recent momentum and relevance
Limited evidence of Python mastery or direct experience with AI-driven code production at scale
No clear demonstration of operational ownership, on-call responsibility, or agile scrum champion experience
